patches.hypothesis:
Indie                                             suggested that the issue is with a hardcoded value in the patch. It was deemed that the patch assumes that the input will always be a Comparable, but the root cause is that the method is not properly handling the case where it is not.

Therefore, the refined patch will modify the logic to handle the case where the input is not Comparable, and will use a more general approach to handle different types of inputs. It will also add more test cases to cover edge cases, avoid hardcoded values in the patch, and ensure proper null checks and boundary conditions.
